## 🎯 User Story
As a **[role]**, I want to **[goal]**, so that **[benefit]**.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

## 📐 Definition of Done
- [ ] Implementation is complete
- [ ] Review is complete
- [ ] Relevant validation is complete

## 📘 Context / Notes
Add any context needed for planning and implementation.

## 🔗 Dependencies
- List related issues, blockers, or prerequisite work.

## 🧪 Test Scenarios
- **Scenario:** Given ..., when ..., then ...

## 📎 Additional Resources
- Link any documentation, mockups, or references.
